subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! That which was recorded hath become manifest. As to the matter previously set down [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت میثاق آنچه مسطور بود مشهود گردید در خصوص فقره که از پیش مرقوم شده بود
subcodes.subjects: @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
